product_overview: Edita Logistics is a Flutter-based real-time logistics app that connects clients, drivers, and admins for shipment creation, live tracking, and fleet management using Firebase and Mapbox.
core_goals: Provide real-time visibility of shipments and driver locations with ETA and phase-aware status.
Offer an optimized in-app GPS experience for drivers with phase segmentation (pickup/delivery) and offline resilience.
Automate trip status pipelines from assignment to completion with clear phase transitions.
Ensure resilience and offline-first behavior by caching location data locally and syncing to Firestore when online.
Prevent crashes and race conditions through guarded routing and robust error handling across async flows.

features.name: Splash Screen & Initialization
features.description: App startup flow that initializes location, requests permissions, and routes the user to the appropriate entry point based on authentication state.
user_flows: Launch app -> Navigate to /splash -> Initialize locationServiceProvider and splashCompleteProvider -> Request GPS permission -> Receive permissions granted -> Wait branding timeout -> If user authenticated redirect to role dashboard (/client or /driver or /admin) -> See respective home screen

Launch app -> Navigate to /splash -> Initialize services -> Request GPS permission -> User denies permission -> Show permission required dialog with instructions -> Offer Retry or Continue to /login -> If user chooses Continue navigate to /login with limited location functionality

features.name: Authentication & Roles
features.description: Email/password authentication using Firebase Auth, Firestore-backed user profiles, role selection at registration, role-based routing, profile updates, and sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Authentication succeeds -> Router redirects to role-based dashboard (/client or /driver or /admin) -> See role home screen
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Authentication fails (invalid credentials) -> See error message and remain on /login

Navigate to /register -> Choose user role (client/driver/admin) -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Register button -> Account created in Firestore -> Redirect to role-based onboarding or dashboard
Navigate to /profile -> Update name field -> Update phone field -> Upload avatar -> Click Save -> Profile updates persist to users collection in Firestore -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /profile -> Click Sign out -> Sign out completes -> Redirect to /login

features.name: Client Shipment Management
features.description: Clients create, search, sort, and manage shipments; view pricing, priority, and shipment history.
user_flows: Navigate to /client -> See client dashboard with active and completed shipments -> Tap New Shipment -> Select origin on map -> Select destination on map -> Click Calculate Price -> Review price and details -> Confirm and Submit -> New shipment appears in active shipments list

Navigate to /client -> Tap New Shipment -> Select origin on map -> Select destination on map -> App requests location or map permissions -> User denies map/location permission -> Show permission required error -> New shipment not created
Navigate to /client -> Use search field -> Enter query or apply sort by date/distance/price -> View filtered and sorted shipment list
Navigate to /client -> Open a completed shipment -> Tap Clear Completed -> Shipment moves to history view

features.name: Real-time Shipment Tracking
features.description: Client-facing map tracking with factory and destination markers, moving driver marker, polylines, ETA and distance updates streamed from Firestore and Mapbox.
user_flows: Navigate to /client -> Tap shipment card -> Navigate to /client/tracking/:shipmentId -> Map loads with factory marker -> Map shows destination marker -> Map renders polyline route -> Driver marker appears and moves in real-time -> ETA and distance update in UI -> Close tracking

Navigate to /client/tracking/:shipmentId -> Map attempts to load tiles -> Map tile load fails due to connectivity -> Show offline/stale-data warning -> Display last known driver location and stale ETA message

Navigate to /client -> Tap shipment card -> Navigate to /client/tracking/:shipmentId -> Tap ETA or info panel -> See detailed phase-aware status (Factory Leg / Delivery Leg) and estimated arrival times

features.name: Driver Trip Management
features.description: Driver interface for accepting shipments, starting trips, live navigation-like map, phase transitions, live location sharing, and offline caching of GPS points.
user_flows: Navigate to /driver -> See list of assigned and available shipments -> Tap assigned shipment -> Navigate to /driver/trip/:shipmentId -> Tap Start Trip -> App requests GPS permission -> Live route loads with Mapbox directions -> Location listener starts and app shares live location -> Follow route and in-app navigation UI shows heading and pitch -> Tap Confirm Pickup when at factory -> UI switches to delivery phase -> Tap Confirm Delivery at destination -> Tap Complete Trip -> Trip marked completed in Firestore

Navigate to /driver/trip/:shipmentId -> Tap Start Trip -> GPS permission denied or network disconnected -> App begins caching location points locally (Hive) and shows offline indicator -> Continue trip -> On network restore app syncs cached points to Firestore and updates shipment status
Navigate to /driver -> Tap an available shipment -> Tap Accept -> Shipment assigned to driver in Firestore -> See assigned shipment appear in driver home list

features.name: Admin Fleet Dashboard
features.description: Admin dashboard for monitoring global shipment stats, browsing shipments, and viewing online drivers with contact and availability details.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Dashboard loads with summary stats (pending, in-transit, active drivers) -> Tap Shipments list -> Browse shipments with origin/destination/status -> Tap Drivers list -> View online drivers and contact details -> Click Sign out -> Redirect to /login
Navigate to /admin -> Apply status filter to shipments -> See filtered list of shipments matching selected status
Navigate to /admin -> Non-admin user attempts to access /admin -> See unauthorized access message -> Redirect to /login

tech_stack: go_router, riverpod, freezed, firebase_auth, cloud_firestore, mapbox_maps_flutter

routes.description: Splash screen that initializes location, permissions, and routing.
User login screen with email/password and role-based redirect.
User registration screen for client, driver, and admin roles.
Client dashboard listing shipments, stats, and quick actions.
Driver home screen showing assigned and available shipments.
Driver trip screen with live route, stats, and actions.
Admin dashboard with fleet, shipments, and driver overview.

features.name: Authentication & Roles
features.description: Email/password authentication with Firebase Auth, Firestore-backed user profiles, and role-based routing for client, driver, and admin.
user_interactions: Fill email and password fields and submit the login form.
Choose a user role when registering a new account.
Update profile details such as name, phone, and avatar.
Sign out from the profile menu or overflow actions.

features.name: Client Shipment Management
features.description: Client can create, search, sort, and manage shipments with pricing, priority, and history views.
user_interactions: Open the client dashboard to view active and completed shipments.
Search and sort shipments by date, distance, and price.
Tap "New Shipment" and complete the multi-step create shipment flow.
Clear completed shipments to move them into history.
Open shipment tracking to view the live map and driver status.

features.name: Driver Trip Management
features.description: Drivers see assigned shipments, start trips, and stream live location for pickup and delivery legs.
user_interactions: Open the driver home screen to view assigned shipments.
Start a trip for a selected shipment and follow the map route.
Update shipment status through pickup, in progress, and completed phases.
Share live location which updates the client tracking screen.

api_calls.endpoint: drivers collection and shipment status updates

features.name: Admin Fleet Dashboard
features.description: Admins monitor active shipments and online drivers with summary stats and detailed lists.
user_interactions: View global stats for pending and in-transit shipments and active drivers.
Browse live shipments with origin, destination, and status.
Browse online drivers with availability and contact details.
Sign out from the admin dashboard.

api_calls.endpoint: aggregated reads from shipments and drivers collections

features.name: Real-time Shipment Tracking
features.description: Real-time map-based tracking of shipments for clients with factory and destination markers, polylines, and ETA.
user_interactions: Open tracking from a shipment card in the client dashboard.
View factory, destination, and driver markers on the map.
Read ETA, distance, and phase-aware status information.

api_calls.endpoint: shipment location history and status streams
